items.content_html: A autohotkey script to capture speedtest-cli output and run the test quickly for only few seconds. It copies the output in the clipboard. It does not run in the background. Manual intervention of mouse and keyboard is not recommended during running the script. U need to replace the path of Cli speed test in the bat script. speedtest.net/apps/cli
items.title: ITS0ABOUT0TIME/quickspeedtest: A autohotkey script to capture speedtest-cli output and run the test quickly for only few seconds. It copies the output in the clipboard. It does not run in the background. Manual intervention of mouse and keyboard is not recommended during running the script. U need to  replace the path of Cli speed test in the bat script. speedtest.net/apps/cli
